headline: Sandisk and Micron sink as rotation trade builds
detail: Chip names are getting hit by active sector rotation today, with money flowing out of semis. This directly pressures SMH and SOXL in your book, and the 3X leverage on SOXL turns a modest sector dip into a meaningful portfolio hit. Supply shortage caveat may limit deeper losses but doesn't stop the short-term pain.
rec: No new action warranted by this headline alone - you're already long SMH and SOXL. Focus is on respecting your stops, not adding exposure into a sector under rotation pressure today.

headline: CoreWeave and Nebius tumble as Meta threatens cloud
detail: AI infrastructure names getting hit on competitive threat news, signaling the market is repricing AI-cloud exposure broadly. While you don't hold these names directly, CRWD and the broader tech/chip basket you're concentrated in trade in sympathy with AI sentiment. Margin amplifies any spillover.
rec: CRWD is still up 7.4% for you and holding - no reason to trim yet, but watch it closely if broader AI sentiment continues to deteriorate today.

headline: ServiceNow and Salesforce now look like buys, analyst says
detail: An analyst is calling NOW and CRM oversold, flagging 'Armageddon fears' as too extreme. NOW appears in your scanner as a WATCH setup with an 8/12 score, entry 105.59-105.69, stop 104.82. However, Daily bias is down - a grade B at best.
rec: NOW scanner entry 105.59-105.69, stop 104.82 is technically present, but with Daily bias down and a rotation day in progress, this is a watch-and-confirm idea - not a pull-the-trigger moment today. No action yet.

headline: Jim Cramer says use Wednesday's rotation to your advantage
detail: Rotation days create short-term dislocations in momentum names like yours. The core message is that these moves can create entry points, but your current leveraged exposure means sitting through rotation is costly on margin. No specific ticker data provided to act on.
rec: No action - Cramer commentary without specific data doesn't override what your own positions are telling you. Protect what you have first.
